data.body:
PLAN — epic dc09 (pristine-horrible-whapuku): make identity.require_authenticated safe to enable across all writers.

TREE (1 epic, 5 stories, depth 1). Dep order: {79da local, 4dc0 CI, 1a51 Gerrit} independent -> 8d91 grandfathering (needs anchor) -> 8d39 the flip (depends on all).
- 79da finegrain-songful-octopus: persistent LOCAL write-signing on this machine.
- 4dc0 grabbable-clay-ass: populate GitHub REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY secret + confirm CI signs.
- 1a51 classless-splintery-noctule: classify Gerrit-side writers + finish canary 1787.
- 8d91 dedicated-married-ptarmigan: verify+repin enforce_since grandfathering + regression test + decide anchor.
- 8d39 cursorial-unallergic-allosaurus: atomic flip require_authenticated=true + enforce_since in ONE change.

IDENTITY MODEL (established by investigation):
- ONE shared bot identity 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d (Rebar Bot), email joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com, ONE registered ed25519 key. BOTH local machine and CI (reconcile-bridge BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL) resolve to it by git email. This machine operates AS the bot.
- Private key lives in AWS SSM SecureString /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key (ADR-0012). AWS authed (acct 896586841071).
- Config precedence LAYER_ORDER=(default,user,project,env,cli). Project rebar.toml sets NO signing_key -> a signing_key in user config ~/.config/rebar/config.toml wins, machine-wide, every worktree. That is the persistent mechanism for 79da.
- Store currently: 0/5097 events signed. Flipping today would reject every write -> must provision+confirm signing on all surfaces FIRST, then flip (bug 27ae guardrail).

GERRIT CLASSIFICATION (1a51, subagent-verified): opcert-service NON-WRITING (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off, discarded ws); review-bot code_review artifacts GATE-EXEMPT (_GATE_EXEMPT_TYPES verify_authorship.py:125); review-bot reciprocal relates_to LINK on cited work ticket = IN-SCOPE writer (voter.py:278 -> graph/_links.py:264-267), already provisioned to sign via fetch-secrets.sh:98-124 (same SSM key). auto-lander RETIRED (ADR-0047). Jira reconciler is GitHub-side (4dc0), not Gerrit-side.

LANDING METHOD: rebar/Gerrit flow. Code changes (8d91 test, 8d39 rebar.toml) stacked on branch identity-require-authenticated-rollout, pushed to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main, gated by LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, submitted top-of-stack. Provisioning stories (79da/4dc0/1a51) are infra + ticket-attestation, no Gerrit change. Commit: rebar-ticket trailer + DCO Signed-off-by: Joe Oakhart <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>.

ENV: worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-identity-rollout on origin/main (ba2fb1dd4), local .venv build (rebar+[agents]), commit-msg + pre-commit hooks ON. Gates: require_plan_review_for_claim, require_completion_verification_for_close, require_ticket_for_commit all TRUE.

USER DIRECTION: drive to completion autonomously; GitHub+AWS creds available; nothing operator-gated (operator-attested ACs satisfied by me performing the action + recording concrete proof).
